# Blue Waves - Aquatic Center (Full Content)

## About Us
Blue Waves is Attingal's premier aquatic center dedicated to fitness, health, and well-being. We offer top-tier swimming coaching, Zumba, Yoga, and special programs tailored for kids and adults alike. Our facilities are well-maintained to provide a safe and enriching environment for everyone.

## Programs
We offer a variety of programs:
- Swimming Coaching (Beginners & Advanced)
- Kids Swimming Lessons
- Zumba Sessions
- Yoga Classes
- General Pool Access

## Membership
We offer various membership plans including monthly, quarterly, and annual packages, giving flexibility and great value for individuals and families.

## Contact
Address: Attingal, Trivandrum
Email: bluewavesattingal@gmail.com
